name: Products — page renders and shows either honest empty state or clearly-labeled catalog

planSteps.description: Wait up to 12 seconds for the page to render
The page renders without an error boundary, blank screen, 404, or raw stack traces visible to the user

Product cards (if any are displayed) show meaningful content — a name, description, and price or 'coming soon' status. There must NOT be any product cards showing 'undefined', 'null', 'NaN', or empty title/price fields

If products are placeholder/demo content, this is disclosed visibly (e.g. a 'demo catalog' or 'coming soon' badge on the page or on individual cards). If products are real, all fields (name, price, description) are populated
